case_title: JIA LIN CHEN VS. YU OUYANG

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, JIA LIN AS TO DEFENDANT OUYANG, YU AN INDIVIDUAL DBA CARPENTECH COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEN, JIA LIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OUYANG, YU AN INDIVIDUAL DBA CARPENTECH COMPANY $10,243.60 PRINCIPAL, $61.40 INTEREST, $330.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,635.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
